sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، الِاهْتِمَامُ بِالْبِيئَةِ مَسْؤُولِيَّتُنَا جَمِيعًا.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, briga o okolini je naša zajednička odgovornost.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, caring for the environment is all our responsibility.
I avoid throwing rubbish on the road.

sentences.arabic: أُحَاوِلُ أَنْ أَسْتَخْدِمَ الْمَاءَ وَالضَّوْءَ بِعَقْلَانِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Trudim se koristiti vodu i svjetlo razumno.
sentences.translationEn: I try to use water and light rationally.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ شَيْءٍ صَغِيرٍ نَفْعَلُهُ يُسَاعِدُ فِي الْحِفَاظِ عَلَى الْبِيئَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svaka mala stvar koju radimo pomaže u zaštiti okoliša.
sentences.translationEn: Every small thing we do helps in protecting the environment.
